creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Dear Greg, 

Unfortunately, this PR has languished for a very, very long time.  Chances 
are, this has been fixed in a more recent FreeBSD version.  Is there any 
chance you could try to reproduce it on 6.3-RELEASE or 7.0-RC1?  I'll go 
ahead and close the PR under the assumption this is fixed unless I hear 
back otherwise in a month or so.  Thanks for the report, and we're very 
sorry about the abysmal response time!
